name: agent-arcade
description: Agent Arcade — stress-relief retro platformer overlay to use while your AI agent is working

scripts.build:frontend: rm -rf dist/game dist/assets && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && cp src/game/index.html dist/game/ && cp src/game/hud.js dist/game/ && cp node_modules/phaser/dist/phaser.min.js dist/game/ && cp -R assets dist/assets
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && cd src-tauri && cargo build
scripts.start: npm run build:frontend && cd src-tauri && cargo tauri dev
scripts.test: npm run build:frontend && npx playwright test
scripts.test:headed: npm run build:frontend && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.release: node -e "const v=process.argv[1];if(!v){console.error('Usage: npm run release <version>');process.exit(1);}const fs=require('fs');const update=(f,r,s)=>{let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace(r,s);fs.writeFileSync(f,c)};update('package.json',/\"version\": \".*?\"/,'\"version\": \"'+v+'\"');update('src-tauri/tauri.conf.json',/\"version\": \".*?\"/,'\"version\": \"'+v+'\"');update('src-tauri/Cargo.toml',/^version = \".*?\"/m,'version = \"'+v+'\"');console.log('Bumped to '+v)" --

author: Dan Wahlin
